selections.name: Island Charm
selections.reason: Possesses the highest class rating in the field (103) and draws a favorable outside post, aligning perfectly with the Aqueduct outside flow bias.

selections.name: My Girl Aubree
selections.reason: Strong class rating of 98 and tactical early/presser speed makes her a major contender dropping into this spot.

selections.name: Speed Walking
selections.reason: Late runner who could benefit if the early pace gets contested; solid 98 speed figure in recent form.

selections.name: Grit N Glitter
selections.reason: Outside draw is a huge plus on this track; consistent presser who can get first run on the closers.

danger_horse.name: Hip Hop Dancer
danger_horse.reason: Apprentice jockey weight allowance and early speed makes her a threat to steal it if left alone.

selections.name: Atarah
selections.reason: Elite class rating of 112 and draws the highly coveted outside post for a dirt sprint at Aqueduct. Prime setup.

selections.name: My Magic Wand
selections.reason: Brilliant early speed (105) and class (111), but must overcome the inside post disadvantage on this surface.

selections.name: The Big Calhouna
selections.reason: Consistent 106 speed/class profile. Rail draw is tough, but has the tactical speed to work out a trip.

selections.name: Artemis Sound
selections.reason: Sustained closer who will be picking up the pieces if the top early speed horses duel into submission.

danger_horse.name: Edistrudis
danger_horse.reason: Outside draw gives this presser a chance to outrun her odds if the pace melts down.

selections.name: Coquito
selections.reason: Excellent outside draw for this early speed type. Class rating of 109 makes her the one to catch.

selections.name: Mursal
selections.reason: Strong class (107) and tactical speed. Should sit a perfect stalking trip just off the early leaders.

selections.name: Pens Street
selections.reason: Sustained runner with a 106 speed figure. Will be flying late and benefits from the outside flow.

selections.name: Despo's Dream
selections.reason: Solid presser with a 105 class rating. Can factor in the exotics with a clean trip.

danger_horse.name: Baby Sassicaia
danger_horse.reason: Outside post is a major advantage; early/presser style could allow her to clear the field early.

selections.name: C J Star
selections.reason: Top class and speed figures (112) in this field. Tactical presser style is ideal for the turf course.

selections.name: Quiet Power
selections.reason: Matches the top pick on speed figures. Inside draw on the turf is fine; should save ground and fire late.

selections.name: Donnadoyawanna
selections.reason: Strong sustained closer with a 112 speed figure. Will be dangerous in the final furlong.

selections.name: Sidearm
selections.reason: Posted a massive 114 speed figure recently. If he replicates that effort, he is a major player.

danger_horse.name: Cuban Cowboy
danger_horse.reason: First start since being gelded; equipment change could unlock significant improvement.

selections.name: Athena's Fury
selections.reason: Consistent 103 speed and class ratings. Tactical presser who can overcome the outside draw on the turf.

selections.name: Intothewilderness
selections.reason: Solid 102 class rating and draws well. Should get a ground-saving trip just off the pace.

selections.name: Mizty Fog
selections.reason: Good speed figures (102) and fits the class level well. Wide draw is the only concern.

selections.name: Valiant Diva
selections.reason: Tactical speed from an inside post. Should be in the mix early and can hold on for a piece.

danger_horse.name: Addagirl Addie
danger_horse.reason: Sustained closer with a 106 speed figure. If the pace is hot, she will be flying late.

selections.name: Judge Boushay
selections.reason: Massive class advantage (115) and strong early/presser speed (107). Looks very tough to beat in this spot.

selections.name: Liam's Legacy
selections.reason: Posted a huge 114 speed figure. If he can repeat that performance, he is the clear main danger.

selections.name: Teuflesdale
selections.reason: Draws the favorable outside post for the dirt mile. Tactical speed should keep him out of trouble.

selections.name: Nordic Fyre
selections.reason: Class rating of 99 is solid. Rail draw is a negative, but he has closing ability if the pace is fast.

danger_horse.name: Always Honest
danger_horse.reason: Mid-pack draw and decent class rating (99) makes him a viable underneath option in exotics.

selections.name: Mermaid
selections.reason: Elite speed (118) and class (115). Early speed on the turf can be lethal if left uncontested.

selections.name: Getting Serious
selections.reason: Highest class rating in the field (116). Tactical presser who will get first run on the front-runners.

selections.name: Bella Knows
selections.reason: Very consistent with a 114 class rating. Should sit a perfect trip from the inside.

selections.name: French Tip
selections.reason: Strong 113 speed figure and saves all the ground from the rail. Major player.

danger_horse.name: Right Timing
danger_horse.reason: Classy filly (110) with early speed. Could wire the field if she gets an easy lead.

selections.name: Authentic Legend
selections.reason: Huge 114 speed figure and solid 102 class. Sustained closer who should get a good pace setup.

selections.name: Highlands Way
selections.reason: First start since being gelded. Posted a 113 speed figure previously; dangerous if he runs back to that.

selections.name: Dynadee
selections.reason: Early speed type who could get brave on the front end if the pace is moderate.

selections.name: Fleet N Ready
selections.reason: Also gelded since last start. Has early speed and could factor into the pace scenario.

danger_horse.name: Tail Risk
danger_horse.reason: Inside draw and solid 95 class rating. Can save ground and sneak into the exotics at a price.
